Home.description: Discover high-quality products at competitive prices. Shop now for the best deals on electronics, fashion, home goods, and more.
Home.ogDescription: Discover high-quality products at competitive prices. Shop now for the best deals.

highQuality.title: High Quality

bestPrices.title: Best Prices
bestPrices.description: Competitive pricing on all our products

warranty.title: Trusted Warranty
warranty.description: Print, embroidery and stitching warranty up to 6 months. 1-for-1 exchange for manufacturer defects.

Home.whyShopWithUsDesc: We don't just sew shirts — we deliver professional brand identity solutions for your business.
Home.processDesc: Fast, transparent and professional. We accompany you at every stage.

process.step1Desc: Receive requirements, advise on materials and send a detailed quote.
process.step2Desc: Free 3D mockup, revisions per client feedback.
process.step3Desc: Sew a real sample for the client to check fit and material.
process.step4Desc: Run on the production line with strict QC inspection.
process.step5Desc: Careful packaging, door-to-door delivery and warranty policy.

Home.galleryDesc: Explore Minh An Uniform's large-scale modern sewing workshop, where the highest quality uniforms are made.

testimonial.text1: Outstanding shirt quality, accurate fit and very sharp print. Enthusiastic consulting team, on-time delivery. Will definitely partner long-term with Minh An Uniform.
testimonial.text2: We are very satisfied with the event t-shirts made by Minh An. Cool fabric, no pilling after many washes. All employees praised them.
testimonial.text3: Fast design, dedicated idea support. The real product exceeded expectations. Very competitive pricing versus the market.

Home.consultationDesc: Leave your info to receive a completely free 3D uniform design draft for your business.
Home.faqDesc: Answers to common questions when ordering uniforms at Minh An.

faq.q1: How long does uniform production take?
faq.a1: Usually 7-15 working days depending on quantity and design complexity. Urgent orders can be handled in 3-5 days.
faq.a2: Yes, Minh An Uniform offers completely free 3D design for all customers until the best sample is approved.
faq.q3: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a3: We produce from 20 items/sample. However, large orders get the best discount.
faq.a4: All materials are quality-tested, guaranteed no fading or pilling, with up to 6-month warranty.

Home.newsDesc: Latest updates on the uniform market.

Product.errorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart

shipping.question: What are your shipping options?
shipping.answer: We offer standard shipping (5-7 business days), express shipping (2-3 business days), and next-day delivery for select areas. Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in their original packaging. Simply contact our support team to initiate a return and receive a prepaid shipping label.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. You can also view your order status anytime by logging into your account and visiting the order history section.

international.question: Do you offer international shipping?
international.answer: Yes! We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. You can see the exact cost at checkout before completing your purchase.

About.title: About Minh An Uniform
About.desc: With over 10 years of experience in uniform manufacturing, we are proud to be a trusted partner of thousands of businesses.
story: Minh An Uniform was founded with the mission of delivering professional, modern and high-quality uniform solutions for every business in Vietnam.
Starting from a small sewing workshop, after more than 10 years of development, we have become a trusted partner of over 5,000 businesses with more than 2 million products manufactured.

With a professional design team, a large-scale modern workshop and an end-to-end process from weaving, dyeing, sewing to printing and embroidery, Minh An Uniform is committed to delivering the highest quality products, on schedule and at competitive prices.
About.valuesDesc: The principles that guide every activity at Minh An Uniform.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Committed to premium fabrics, an end-to-end production process and strict QC inspection.

reputation.title: Reputation
